name: Witch Lessons
description:
A witch's knowledge from their patron comes in the form of lessons, which you can learn by selecting feats like Basic Lesson. Each lesson grants you a hex and teaches your familiar a new spell, adding it to the spells you can prepare using your witch spellcasting. You gain this spell even if it's not on your tradition's spell list.
BASIC LESSONSYou can select from these lessons when a feat or another effect grants you a basic lesson.

Lesson of Dreams You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of the Elements You gain the hex. Your familiar learns your choice of , , , or .

Lesson of Life You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Protection You gain the hex; your familiar learns .

Lesson of Vengeance You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .
UncommonLesson of Calamity: You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .
GREATER LESSONSYou can select from these lessons when a feat or other effect grants you a greater lesson.

Lesson of Mischief You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Shadow You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Snow You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Favors You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Decay All living things eventually decay, feeding fungus and insect. You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of the Flock Power flows when many work as one. You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of the Shark Learn the ways of this deadly oceanic predator. You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .
MAJOR LESSONSYou can select from these lessons when a feat or other effect grants you a major lesson.

Lesson of Bargains You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Death You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .

Lesson of Renewal You gain the hex, and your familiar learns .
RareLesson of Frozen Queen You gain the hex and your familiar learns .
